excerpt: A disastrous second honeymoon in Mexico with wife Deborah Kerr sees committed family man Frank Sinatra swap roles with his bachelor buddy, Dean Martin.
title: Marriage on the Rocks

excerpt: A man, his daughter, and his girlfriend find themselves trapped in a small town gripped by a Satanic cabal.
title: The Brotherhood of Satan

excerpt: While visiting his Venetian hometown, a young professor struggles to expose the killer behind a rash of murders that may be connected to a killing years prior.
title: The Bloodstained Shadow

excerpt: Following a nuclear holocaust, the world’s remaining superpowers engage in gladiatorial combat with giant robots manned by pilots nicknamed “Robot Jox.”
title: Robot Jox

excerpt: A vengeful mummy stalks the British archeologists and American showman who desecrated its tomb.
title: The Curse of the Mummy's Tomb
